calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-11-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: CHARLES TILLMAN RAMSEY, ESQ. FOR PLTF GLENDALE COOPERATIVE APTS, BRIDGETTE HOWARD IN PRO PER.

THE CAUSE SETTLED AND THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT ARE PUT ON THE RECORD:
DEFENDANT MAY REMAIN AT THE PREMISES, 62 ADDISON ST. SF., CA 94131 WITH CONDITIONS;
DEFENDANT IS TO PAY $935 BY 5 PM, AUGUST 20, 2004 BY CASHIER'S CHECK OR MONEY ORDER AND NOT BY PERSNAL CHECK AND ALSO TO PAY MONTHLY RENT OF $187 ON THE 1ST OF EVERY MONTH AND NO LATER THAN THE 5TH STARTING IN SEPTEMBER 2004. DEFENDANT IS ALSO TO PAY $700 ATTORNEY'S FEES. IF DEFENDANT DOESN'T COMPLY WITH THE TERMS, PLAINTIFF WILL SEEK TO HAVE JUDGMENT FILED. IF DEFENDANT COMPLIES, PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS THE CASE WITH PREJUDICE.
THE TRIAL DATE IS VACATED.

JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL ARSHAWSKY, REPORTER ANN MENDOZA,CLERK T.MARUYAMA (218)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-07-2004 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-07-2004 Vacated
